description: Bundle both individually-validated exit-param changes: tp1_qty_fraction 0.50→0.667 (Rank 29) AND time_stop_minutes_before_close 10→20 (Rank 30). Recommended as a single deployment over sequential changes.

combined_vs_additive.interaction_note: Near-additive. IS +$16 bonus (0.1%), OOS -$95 discount (6%). Both parameters improve independently and compose cleanly.

sub_window_stability.note: All market regimes improve: pre-tariff, tariff shock, recovery. No regime-conditional artifact.

negative_sweeps_this_session.f9_vol_mult: Production 0.7 is already OOS-optimal. All other values worse OOS. No improvement available.
negative_sweeps_this_session.no_trade_before: 09:35 (production) is already optimal. Later times consistently hurt IS and OOS.
negative_sweeps_this_session.no_trade_window: None (production, v15.1 removal) is optimal. Reinstating 14:00-15:00 window: IS+$2,255, OOS-$274, WF=-0.12 FAIL. v15.1 removal decision confirmed correct.

implementation.note: Both params already wired to simulate_trade_real() via L108+L110 fixes. EOD flatten tasks (15:55 ET) are independent safety net — no conflict with 15:40 heartbeat time stop.

overall_verdict: PASS - NEEDS J DECISION. WF=1.08, all 4 sub-windows HELP, near-additive with individual candidates. Auto-ratify blocked by evidence_n=17 < 20. Combined OOS P&L: +$4,747 vs production +$3,304 (+44% improvement). Recommend J approve as a single bundle.
supersedes: Consider deploying combined instead of Rank 29 and Rank 30 individually. All three paths are valid but combined is most efficient.
